fields.summary: 500 error when fetching user with special characters in name
fields.description:
## Bug Report

GET /api/users?name=O'Brien returns 500 Internal Server Error.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Create a user with name "O'Brien"
2. Call GET /api/users?name=O'Brien
3. Server returns 500

## Expected
Should return the user record.

## Actual
500 error. Logs show: `sqlalchemy.exc.ProgrammingError: unterminated string literal`

## Root Cause (suspected)
SQL injection vulnerability in the user search query. The name parameter is not being properly escaped/parameterized.
